sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: MGIC Investment Corporation Announces an Increase to Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: MGIC Investment Corporation (NYSE: MTG) has announced that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.17 per share, marking a 13% increase from the previous $0.15 per share. The dividend is set to be payable on August 20, 2026, to shareholders of record as of August 5, 2026. MGIC provides mortgage insurance solutions and supports responsible credit risk management for lenders, enabling borrowers to qualify for mortgages with lower down payments.

feed.title: VanEck Ethereum Share Price | NYSE:ETHV ETF
feed.summary: This article provides an in-depth look at the VanEck Ethereum ETF (NYSE: ETHV), offering real-time share price, historical data, and technical analysis. It details key statistics such as the ETF's expense ratio, total assets, and inception date, alongside recent news and performance metrics. The content aims to equip investors with comprehensive information to make informed decisions regarding the ETHV ETF.

feed.title: Intel sales climb 25%; shares jump
feed.summary: Intel announced its strongest revenue growth in 15 years, with quarterly sales exceeding $16 billion, an increase of 25% from the previous year. The company plans to "significantly" boost capital spending to over $20 billion in anticipation of continued rapid growth and rising customer demand, especially in its data center group fueled by AI. Intel also committed to high-volume production of its new 14A manufacturing technology by late 2028, reversing previous hesitations, though shares gave back some initial gains after Wall Street learned of the increased spending plans.

feed.title: American Electric Power Co. Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: American Electric Power Co. Inc. (AEP) saw its stock rise by 1.39% to $134.92 on Thursday, despite a difficult trading session where the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average both fell. This marks the second consecutive day of gains for the company's stock. The article highlights AEP's strong performance relative to the broader market.

feed.title: Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. Plans Quarterly Dividend of $0.29 (NASDAQ:ODFL)
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. (NASDAQ:ODFL) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.29 per share, payable on September 16th to shareholders of record as of September 2nd. The company boasts a strong dividend history, with five consecutive years of increases and a low payout ratio of 19.3%, indicating ample coverage by earnings. Despite a slight year-over-year revenue decrease, Old Dominion Freight Line exceeded analyst EPS estimates in its latest quarter and maintains an attractive investor profile with significant institutional interest.

feed.title: LCID Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Lucid Group, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm is reminding investors of a class action lawsuit against Lucid Group, Inc. (LCID) concerning alleged securities fraud violations. Investors who purchased LCID securities between February 25, 2026, and April 13, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm before July 28, 2026. The lawsuit claims Lucid made false and misleading statements about supplier quality issues and manufacturing capabilities, leading to investor losses.

To cover tax liabilities, 886 shares were withheld at $163.00 per share. After this transaction, Tallapragada holds 5,356 RSUs and 71,067 common shares.

feed.title: Co-design networking powers AMD Helios rack-scale AI
feed.summary: AMD emphasized the critical role of open co-design networking in its Helios rack-scale AI platform at its Advancing AI 2026 event. The company, alongside Meta Platforms Inc., highlighted how the surge in token consumption (158x in two years) necessitates foundational network robustness, reliability, and programmability. The article details their joint efforts in building scale-up interconnects over Ethernet, underscoring the shift from server-rack to data-center-wide deployments and the increasing complexity introduced by agentic AI workloads.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Kelly Garcia Sells 12,430 Shares of Domino's Pizza Inc (DPZ)
feed.summary: Kelly Garcia, Executive Vice President, Chief Technology & Data Officer at Domino's Pizza Inc (DPZ), sold 12,430 shares of the company on July 22, 2026. This transaction follows other insider sells over the past year, with no insider buys recorded. Based on current trading data and GuruFocus Value, Domino's Pizza stock, trading at $322.04 with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.66, is considered significantly undervalued.

feed.title: NC leaders push Duke Energy to make federal data center pledge legally binding
feed.summary: North Carolina leaders, including Governor Josh Stein and Attorney General Jeff Jackson, are urging Duke Energy to make its voluntary federal pledge regarding data center electricity costs legally binding. They want Duke Energy to establish enforceable rate structures through the North Carolina Utilities Commission to ensure that households and small businesses do not bear the increasing costs associated with the rapid expansion of data centers. Duke Energy states its commitment to ensuring large power users cover their own costs and has introduced a Customer Protection Plus framework.

feed.title: Smucker Hires Douglas Guilherme for Operations and Supply Chain
feed.summary: J.M. Smucker Co. has appointed Douglas Guilherme as its senior vice president of operations and supply chain, reporting to Rob Ferguson. Guilherme brings over 30 years of experience from companies like Hershey Co., Procter & Gamble, and Ecolab. This new role aims to leverage his extensive global supply chain and operations leadership expertise.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Digital Realty lifts 2026 outlook after record Q2 2026
feed.summary: Digital Realty reported a record second quarter in 2026, with core funds from operations (FFO) hitting $2.13 per share, a 14% year-over-year increase, and raised its full-year 2026 core FFO guidance. The company saw strong demand across colocation, hyperscale, and private capital, achieving record bookings and a strategic expansion into new markets and private capital platforms. These results, including significant growth in its development pipeline and robust renewal spreads, position Digital Realty for sustained double-digit earnings growth into 2027 and beyond.

feed.title: Carrier acquires Twin Cities high-tech HVAC startup 75F
feed.summary: Carrier has acquired 75F, a Twin Cities-based high-tech HVAC startup specializing in AI-based building automation technology. Last year, 75F successfully raised $45 million to further develop and expand its innovative solutions for commercial properties.

feed.title: KeyCorp (KEY) Launches Check Fraud Tool For Small Business Clients
feed.summary: KeyCorp has introduced "Check Control for Business," a new digital fraud protection service through its KeyBank subsidiary, specifically targeting small business clients. This low-cost tool is designed to mitigate check fraud risks and improve reconciliation for businesses that still use paper checks, aligning with KeyCorp's strategy to expand digital offerings and fee-based services. The service aims to strengthen relationships with small firms, protect low-cost deposits, and differentiate KeyBank in a competitive market.

feed.title: Raymond James (RJF) Stock Faces Slower 6% Earnings Outlook Despite Solid Q3 EPS Result
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial (RJF) reported strong Q3 2026 results with US$3.95 billion revenue and US$3.07 basic EPS, bringing trailing twelve-month EPS to US$11.70. Despite this solid performance and a P/E ratio below peers, analysts forecast slower future earnings growth of around 6% annually, lower than the broader US market. This outlook creates tension for investors weighing the company's consistent earnings history and current undervaluation against projected slower growth.

feed.title: Should Stronger Q2 2026 Earnings and Lower Charge-offs Require Action From Live Oak Bancshares (LOB) Investors?
feed.summary: Live Oak Bancshares recently reported stronger Q2 2026 results, with net interest income rising to US$125.34 million and net income to US$36.8 million, while net charge-offs decreased. The company nearly doubled net income in the first half of 2026. While these results support the company's investment narrative, investors should continue to monitor credit trends due to historically high bad loan ratios and ongoing digital investment costs.

feed.title: NVR: Q2 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: NVR Inc. reported earnings of $236.5 million, or $83.96 per share, for its second quarter. The homebuilder also announced revenues of $2.28 billion for the period. This financial snapshot was generated by Automated Insights using data from Zacks Investment Research.

feed.title: Form 4 Cintas Corporation For: 23 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article is a brief announcement from Investing.com confirming the filing of a Form 4 for Cintas Corporation on July 23. It includes the stock symbol CTAS and notes a slight increase in its share price. The content primarily serves as a placeholder for financial reporting news.

feed.title: Nevada regulators seek answers about proposed Barry Diller acquisition of MGM Resorts
feed.summary: Nevada Gaming Commission members recently pressed MGM Resorts International for answers regarding Barry Diller's proposed $18 billion acquisition of the company, citing concerns for the state’s largest private-sector employer. MGM's Chandler Pohl stated he could not provide more information than what is publicly available, noting that a special committee was formed to review the offer. Regulators also expressed concerns about the impact on MGM's employees and its casino development in Osaka, Japan.

feed.title: Blowback from latest DTE outage surfaces on midterm campaign trail
feed.summary: A recent DTE Energy outage, which left 400,000 customers without power over the July 4th weekend, has become a significant issue on the Michigan midterm campaign trail. Democratic candidates are leveraging public outrage to push for utility reforms, including freezing rate hikes, increasing outage credits, and restricting utility political spending. The Michigan Public Service Commission has launched an investigation into the utilities' storm response, while a ballot initiative to ban political donations from monopoly companies is set for a key decision.

feed.title: National Storage Affiliates Completes Merger with Public Storage
feed.summary: National Storage Affiliates (NSA) has finalized its merger with Public Storage, converting all NSA shares into Public Storage securities and leading to the delisting of NSA from the NYSE. NSA is now an indirect subsidiary of Public Storage, and its former executives' roles have been terminated with severance. TipRanks' AI Analyst considers NSA a "Neutral" stock due to mixed financial performance but notes the Public Storage acquisition as a modest boost.

The text mentions "Stock Market Published 2026-07-23, 06:16 p/m" within the content.

feed.title: Form 144 General Electric Co. For: 23 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article announces that General Electric Co. filed a Form 144 on July 23. This financial filing indicates an intent to sell restricted securities. The article provides minimal details beyond this announcement.

feed.title: PRIVACY ALERT: Abbott Laboratories and Exact Sciences Corporation Under Investigation for Data Breach of Patient Records
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories and its subsidiary Exact Sciences Corporation are under investigation for a data breach reported in July 2026, where the cybercriminal group ShinyHunters allegedly accessed sensitive patient information, including Social Security numbers, from legacy cancer diagnostics systems. The companies have not yet confirmed the extent of the data exfiltration or begun notifying affected individuals, potentially violating state and federal laws. Individuals impacted by this incident may be entitled to money damages and an injunction to improve the companies' cybersecurity practices.

feed.title: Landstar names Bill Clement as Chief Commercial Officer to drive growth and strengthen customer ties.
feed.summary: Landstar System, Inc. has appointed William "Bill" Clement as Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer, effective August 1, 2026. Clement will be responsible for leading commercial strategy, supporting the independent agent network, and driving growth in strategic transportation services. With over 30 years of experience, his appointment is expected to enhance Landstar's market position and customer relationships.

feed.title: Stride, Inc. rebounds with 30% YTD gain, trading at a forward PE of 10.33 amid growth opportunities and risks.
feed.summary: Stride, Inc. (LRN), an online educational technology provider, has seen a 30% year-to-date gain after a previous crash, trading at a forward P/E of 10.33. The company is supported by stable contracts, significant cash reserves, and the growth potential of its Career Learning segment. However, investors should be aware of risks including intense competition, legal issues, and regulatory changes.

feed.title: Mosaic Biosciences: Biological Crop Inputs and Elicit Plant Partnership for Water Efficiency - News and Statistics
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company is significantly investing in biological innovation through Mosaic Biosciences, an initiative stemming from its acquisition of Plant Response. They have partnered with Elicit Plant to develop canola products that enhance water efficiency and maintain yield under water stress, particularly for the North American market. This collaboration addresses challenges related to climate risks and limited water availability, expanding on Elicit Plant's success with phytosterol-based bio-stimulants.

feed.title: LiveWire Reports Q2 2026 Results
feed.summary: LiveWire reported increased sales in electric motorcycles and STACYC balance bikes for Q2 2026, with motorcycle sales reaching $3.6 million and STACYC balance bike revenues growing to $5.5 million. Despite a net loss of $18.2 million, this marks an improvement from the previous year's $18.8 million loss. The company also commenced production of its S4 Honcho platform and acquired Dust Motorcycles, anticipating further growth in the coming quarters.

feed.title: Millennium group (AMRC) discloses 5.2% Ameresco position in Schedule 13G
feed.summary: Millennium Management LLC, Millennium Group Management LLC, and Israel A. Englander have disclosed a 5.2% beneficial ownership in Ameresco, Inc. (AMRC) Class A Common Stock via a Schedule 13G filing. This represents 1,816,169 shares with shared voting and dispositive power. The filing clarifies that while the shares are held by entities under their control, this should not be construed as an admission of beneficial ownership.

feed.title: Intel Benefits From a New Shift in A.I. Spending
feed.summary: Intel has reported its fastest revenue growth in 15 years, with a 25 percent increase in the latest quarter, driven by increasing purchases of central processing units by AI firms. The company's data center segment saw nearly 60 percent growth, pushing Intel's stock up significantly in after-hours trading. Despite a net loss due to restructuring costs and an accounting adjustment, the results indicate a strong rebound for Intel in the booming AI market.

feed.title: Affiliated Managers Group (AMG) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Q2 Release
feed.summary: Affiliated Managers Group (AMG) is expected to show significant year-over-year earnings growth for Q2 2026, with EPS predicted to increase by 45.6% and revenues by 13.1%. The Zacks Earnings ESP indicates a likely earnings beat for AMG, given its positive ESP of +1.86% and a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy). Invesco (IVZ), another industry player, is also expected to report strong earnings growth and a likely beat.

feed.summary: Charles Schwab (SCHW) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.32 per share. This dividend will be payable on August 28 to shareholders of record as of August 14. The announcement signifies the company's consistent dividend policy.

feed.summary: GE HealthCare has announced that its CFO, James Saccaro, will be stepping down. The company also anticipates its second-quarter adjusted earnings to exceed previous expectations. This news was released on July 23, 2026, alongside preliminary Q2 results.

feed.title: McDonald’s declares $1.86 quarterly dividend per share
feed.summary: McDonald's Corporation has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.86 per share of common stock. This dividend will be paid on September 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 1, 2026. The company operates over 45,000 locations globally, with approximately 95% owned and operated by independent local business owners.

feed.title: STX (STX): James C. Lee files notice to sell 543 common shares
feed.summary: James C. Lee, a shareholder of Seagate Technology Holdings plc (STX), has filed a Form 144 notice indicating his intent to sell 543 shares of common stock through Morgan Stanley on or after July 23, 2026. The planned sale has an aggregate market value of $490,740.98. The filing also notes 1,237 shares related to restricted stock unit vesting and references a prior sale of 697 shares on May 4, 2026.

feed.title: Stein, Jackson say NC regulators need to hold Duke Energy to federal data center pledge
feed.summary: North Carolina Governor Josh Stein and Attorney General Jeff Jackson are urging the state Utilities Commission to compel Duke Energy to formally commit to the Trump administration's Ratepayer Protection Pledge. They want Duke Energy to agree in writing to prevent data centers from shifting costs to consumers, ensuring a legally binding agreement that requires data centers to cover their full power and infrastructure expenses. This comes as North Carolina leaders have been working on stricter regulations for data centers, including repealing sales tax exemptions on electricity purchases for these facilities.

feed.title: Freeport McMoRan eyes $4.5B expansion of Arizona mine as investment decision looms
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan Inc. is planning a $4.5 billion expansion of its mine operation in northwest Arizona. The company expects to make an investment decision by the end of the year. This expansion aims to increase copper production by 200 to 250 million pounds annually.
